hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
if [[ "$file" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css)$ ]] && [ -f "$file" ]; then
  proj=$(git -C "$(dirname "$file")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)
  if [ -n "$proj" ]; then
    cd "$proj" && vp fmt "$file" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  fi
fi

#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
status=0
file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
if [[ "$file" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]] && [ -f "$file" ]; then
  proj=$(git -C "$(dirname "$file")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)
  if [ -n "$proj" ]; then
    cd "$proj" && vp check >&2 || echo "[Hook] vp check failed — run 'vp check' to see details" >&2
  fi
fi
exit 0

#!/bin/bash
# Relative import check — ~ alias required
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  relative_imports=$(grep -nE "from ['\"]\.\.?/" "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || true)
  if [ -n "$relative_imports" ]; then
    echo "[Hook] WARNING: Relative import detected in $file_path" >&2
    echo "$relative_imports" | head -5 >&2
    echo "[Hook] Use '~/' alias instead of relative paths" >&2
  fi
fi

#!/bin/bash
# interface keyword check — use type instead
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  interfaces=$(grep -nE "^[[:space:]]*(export )?interface " "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || true)
  if [ -n "$interfaces" ]; then
    echo "[Hook] WARNING: 'interface' found in $file_path — use 'type' instead" >&2
    echo "$interfaces" | head -5 >&2
  fi
fi

#!/bin/bash
# export default check — forbidden outside src/routes/ directory
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  if [[ ! "$file_path" =~ /routes/ ]]; then
    defaults=$(grep -n "export default" "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || true)
    if [ -n "$defaults" ]; then
      echo "[Hook] WARNING: 'export default' found in $file_path" >&2
      echo "$defaults" | head -5 >&2
      echo "[Hook] Use named exports. Default exports are only allowed in src/routes/ files." >&2
    fi
  fi
fi

#!/bin/bash
# try-catch check — use better-result pattern instead
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  # Exclude test files
  if [[ ! "$file_path" =~ \.(test|spec)\.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then
    trycatch=$(grep -nE "(\} catch|try \{)" "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || true)
    if [ -n "$trycatch" ]; then
      echo "[Hook] WARNING: try-catch found in $file_path" >&2
      echo "$trycatch" | head -5 >&2
      echo "[Hook] Use better-result pattern (Result.tryPromise / result.match) instead" >&2
    fi
  fi
fi
